notes: Environmental fluids. Currently limited to Water, a planned mechanic arriving in vertical slice VS3. The O2/H2 Generator entries already list 'water' as an input; the entry here closes that cross-reference. The wiki page for Water is prose-only (no infobox) and explicitly states it will require a new save when VS3 arrives. Planet-level biome data is not yet published — Verdure will ship with oceans, lakes, and coasts, and Byblos is described as a 'mysterious planned water planet' with details TBD.

resources.description: Planned liquid resource arriving in vertical slice VS3. Will be electrolysed alongside ice by O2/H2 Generators to produce hydrogen and oxygen. Verdure will feature oceans, lakes, and coasts from VS3 onward; Byblos is described as a mysterious planned water planet with further details TBD. Introducing water will require starting a new save.
dataGaps: wiki page is prose-only and explicitly marks Water as a planned mechanic
